PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/services" -UseBasicParsing; "services: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "services FAIL: $_" }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/schedule" -UseBasicParsing; "schedule: $\($r.StatusCode\) - $\($r.Content.Substring\(0,80\)\)" } catch { "schedule FAIL: $_" })

PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id 25852,2364,19868 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Set-Location "c:\\Users\\johnp\\Desktop\\PROJECTS\\WEB projects\\MEMOS BARBERSHOP V2"; $p = Start-Process -FilePath "node" -ArgumentList "server.js" -PassThru; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { $s = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/schedule" -UseBasicParsing; "schedule OK: $\($s.Content.Substring\(0,60\)\)" } catch { "FAIL: $_" })
